name: MultiSelect
visual_summary: A dropdown list of multiple selectable items, allowing users to pick one or multiple options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready select component with the following characteristics:

Name: MultiSelect
Description: A dropdown list of multiple selectable items, allowing users to pick one or multiple options.
Style: native
Interactions: clickable
Tags: dropdown, selectable, multiple

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/MultiSelect/index.ts
import type { MultiSelectFactory, MultiSelectProps, MultiSelectStylesNames } from './MultiSelect';

export { MultiSelect } from './MultiSelect';

export type { MultiSelectProps, MultiSelectStylesNames, MultiSelectFactory };
